Year in Review

What Happened
in 2003?

Major events, music, film, tech & prices from 2003

The World in 2003
🌍EventsSpace Shuttle Columbia breaks apart on re-entry (Feb 1) · US invades Iraq; Saddam Hussein's regime topples (Mar 20) · US president declares 'Mission Accomplished' in Iraq (May 1) · SARS epidemic spreads globally, killing 774 people · Saddam Hussein captured in a spider hole (Dec 13) · Arnold Schwarzenegger elected Governor of California (Oct)
🎵MusicIn da Club – 50 Cent
🎬FilmThe Lord of the Rings: Return of the King
💻TechMySpace and LinkedIn both launched, pioneering social networking
🛒PricesBread $1.06 · Gas $1.59/gal · House $180,200

What major events happened in 2003?

2003 was a year of significant world events that shaped history. From political upheavals to cultural milestones, the year left a lasting mark on society. The music charts, cinema screens, and technological landscape of 2003 reflect the era's unique character. Prices for everyday goods like bread, gasoline, and homes give a vivid snapshot of the economic climate of the time.

Why is 2003 historically significant?

Each year carries its own defining moments and cultural touchstones. 2003 contributed unique chapters to the story of the 20th and 21st centuries. Whether you lived through 2003 or are researching it, the events, art, technology, and everyday costs of that year paint a rich picture of life at the time.

Frequently asked questions

What major events happened in 2003?

Key world events of 2003 include the milestones listed above. These ranged across politics, war, science, and culture, shaping the course of modern history.

What was the #1 song in 2003?

The top song of 2003 is listed in the music row above. Popular music in 2003 reflected the tastes and mood of the era.

What movies came out in 2003?

The standout film of 2003 is shown in the film row above. Cinema in 2003 captured the spirit of the times and influenced popular culture for years to come.

What did things cost in 2003?

In 2003, everyday prices included the figures shown in the prices row above for bread, gasoline, and the average house. These numbers illustrate how much purchasing power and the cost of living have changed over time.

What technology was new in 2003?

The tech highlight of 2003 is described in the technology row above. Innovations from 2003 often laid the groundwork for technologies we rely on today.
